summary: Admin Moderation System (Promote/Demote) testing completed successfully. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All 11 UI features verified working correctly including promote/demote buttons, confirmation dialogs, and super-admin protection.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote - requires authentication (401)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote - requires admin privileges (403)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote - promotes regular user to admin (200)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote - returns error if user already admin (400)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote - returns 404 for non-existent user
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - requires authentication (401)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - requires admin privileges (403)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - revokes admin rights from promoted user (200)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - returns error for super-admin glaseditionslab@gmail.com (400)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - returns error if user is not admin (400)
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote - returns 404 for non-existent user
Promoted admin can access /api/admin/stats (verified subscription='admin')
GET /api/admin/users?plan=admin - returns only admin users including promoted admins
UI: Admin dashboard loads correctly with stats grid
UI: Shield icon (promote button) with violet color visible for non-admin users
UI: ShieldOff icon (demote button) with amber color visible for promoted admins
UI: Super-admin (glaseditionslab@gmail.com) has NO demote button - protected
UI: Delete button not shown for admin users
UI: Promote confirmation dialog appears with correct text
UI: Demote confirmation dialog appears with correct text (Révoquer les droits administrateur)
UI: Cancel button works in confirmation dialogs
UI: Toast notification shows after successful promote/demote
UI: User badge changes from 'Sans abonnement' to 'Admin' after promotion
seed_data_creation: Created test users with 'TEST_moderation_' prefix during testing, cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Moderation System (Promote/Demote) fully tested and working. Features verified: 1) POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/promote promotes user to admin, 2) POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/demote revokes admin rights, 3) Super-admin (glaseditionslab@gmail.com) is protected from demotion, 4) Promoted admins get unlimited book generation access and can access admin dashboard, 5) Filter plan=admin returns both super-admins and promoted admins, 6) UI shows Shield icon (violet) for promote, ShieldOff icon (amber) for demote, 7) Confirmation dialogs work for both actions, 8) Delete button hidden for admin users.

promoted_admin_access.description: Promoted admins get subscription='admin' and can access /api/admin/stats

admin_filter.description: GET /api/admin/users?plan=admin returns all admin users (both super-admin and promoted)

ui_super_admin_protection.description: glaseditionslab@gmail.com has no demote button in UI

ui_admin_delete_protection.description: Delete button not shown for any admin users
